section.heading: Strategy for improving post-consumer materials management and water management

content.p: Not later than 1 year after December 18, 2020, the EPA Administrator shall, in consultation with stakeholders, develop a strategy to improve post-consumer materials management and infrastructure for the purpose of reducing plastic waste and other post-consumer materials in waterways and oceans.

subsection.heading: Release
subsection.chapeau: On development of the strategy under subsection (a), the EPA Administrator shall—

paragraph.content: distribute the strategy to States; and

paragraph.chapeau: make the strategy publicly available, including for use by—

subparagraph.content: for-profit private entities involved in post-consumer materials management; and
